task_description: Phase 1.1 + I9: Template Namespace Resolution + CSS Cascade Layers — (1) Add theme-aware template resolution so component tags resolve templates by active theme name first, falling back to defaults. Switch from inclusion_tag to select_template() with fallback chain. (2) Wrap generated CSS in @layer declarations (base, tokens, components, theme) so theme author overrides always win regardless of specificity.

checklist.action: read theme_components.py — current inclusion_tag pattern for all component tags
read theme_tags.py — how theme_head, theme_switcher work
read components.py — ThemeSwitcher, ThemeModeButton, PresetSelector rendering
read manager.py — how active theme name is determined (ThemeState.theme)
read css_generator.py and theme_css_generator.py — where CSS output is assembled
design 1.1: template resolution — select_template fallback chain, how to get theme name in tags
design I9: @layer structure — where to wrap existing CSS, how theme layer works
implement 1.1: convert inclusion_tags to select_template with fallback chain
implement I9: wrap CSS in @layer declarations
cross-ref plan, auto-reject triggers, type hints
scan for mark_safe/injection — especially template path injection
update customization.md with theme template override guide and CSS layers explanation

11.name: Code Review
11.subagent_prompt: Review PR #{pr_number} in {project_path} targeting {pr_target_branch}. Read .pipeline-state/*-plan.md. git diff, tests. Post review gh pr review {pr_number} --comment. Output APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES.

13.name: Merge PR
13.subagent_prompt: gh pr merge {pr_number} --squash --delete-branch in {project_path}. Output PR_MERGED or MERGE_FAILED.

14.name: Retrospective
14.subagent_prompt: Retro for {task_description}. PR #{pr_number} in {project_path}. Rate 1-5. gh pr comment {pr_number}. Append .pipeline-log.md. Output RETRO_COMPLETE.
